sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current eyes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  Eye id={n['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nCurrent borders:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'B']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        if min(rows) in [0, 63]:
            print(f"  {n['color']} id={n['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Compare with before
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    print("\nBefore UP:")
    for n in before_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'S':
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            print(f"  Eye id={n['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
    for n in before_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ['W', 'B']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            if min(rows) in [0, 63]:
                print(f"  {n['color']} id={n['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
